# SBTI Personality Test

> SBTI (Silly Big Type Indicator) is a satirical personality test that went viral in April 2026. It assigns users one of 27 humorous personality types through 30 fun questions across 15 dimensions.

## About

SBTI is a free, entertaining alternative to MBTI. Unlike serious personality assessments, SBTI uses humor, internet culture, and absurd scenarios to reveal personality traits. The test is available in Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean.

- Website: https://sbti.support
- Test: https://sbti.support/en (English), https://sbti.support/zh (Chinese)
- Free, no registration required
- 30 questions, ~2 minutes to complete
- 27 personality types + 2 hidden Easter eggs

## 27 Personality Types

CTRL (The Controller), ATM-er (The Giver), Dior-s (The Underdog), BOSS (The Leader), THAN-K (The Grateful), OH-NO (The Worrier), GOGO (The Doer), SEXY (The Charmer), LOVE-R (The Romantic), MUM (The Nurturer), FAKE (The Shapeshifter), OJBK (The Whatever), MALO (The Monkey), JOKE-R (The Clown), WOC! (The Reactor), THIN-K (The Thinker), SHIT (The Grumbler), ZZZZ (The Sleeper), POOR (The Focused), MONK (The Hermit), IMSB (The Overthinker), SOLO (The Loner), FUCK (The Rebel), DEAD (The Detached), IMFW (The Fragile)

Special types: HHHH (The Silly Laugher — fallback), DRUNK (The Drunkard — hidden)

## 15 Scoring Dimensions (5 Models × 3 Each)

- Self Model: S1 Self-Esteem, S2 Self-Clarity, S3 Core Values
- Emotion Model: E1 Attachment Security, E2 Emotional Investment, E3 Boundaries
- Attitude Model: A1 Worldview, A2 Rules & Flexibility, A3 Life Purpose
- Action Model: Ac1 Motivation, Ac2 Decision Style, Ac3 Execution
- Social Model: So1 Social Initiative, So2 Interpersonal Boundaries, So3 Expression

## Type Detail Pages

Each personality type has a dedicated page with full description, dimension pattern, and related types:
- https://sbti.support/en/type/CTRL
- https://sbti.support/en/type/BOSS
- https://sbti.support/en/type/SHIT
- (and 24 more at /en/type/{CODE})

## Multilingual

Available in 4 languages:
- Chinese: https://sbti.support/zh
- English: https://sbti.support/en
- Japanese: https://sbti.support/ja
- Korean: https://sbti.support/ko

## Sitemap

https://sbti.support/sitemap.xml
